title: Remove date from Vastu Advance Course section

requirements.text: In the Services page (or wherever the Vastu Advance Course is displayed), remove any date or date-related text (e.g., course start date, batch date, upcoming date) from the Vastu Advance Course entry.

quotes: In the vastu advance course remove the date!!!!

acceptanceCriteria: No date text is visible in the Vastu Advance Course section.
All other content in the Vastu Advance Course section remains unchanged.
No date is shown in any card, detail panel, or modal related to the Vastu Advance Course.

constraints: Do not remove or alter any other fields or content in the Vastu Advance Course section besides the date.
Do not modify any immutable frontend paths.
nonGoals: Removing dates from other courses or sections.
Redesigning the Services or course layout.
